taxonomy: Tragacantha brachyceras is classified as a species of legume in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea or bean family. It belongs to the genus Tragacantha, which is a group of small shrubs and herbs. The genus Tragacantha is often included in the subfamily Faboideae, along with other legumes. The classification of Tragacantha brachyceras is part of a broader system of plant taxonomy that categorizes organisms by their shared characteristics and evolutionary relationships. This classification helps scientists understand the relationships between different species and their place within the larger tree of life.
